006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

008 *

016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth.flow;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020
021import java.net.*;
022import java.util.*;
023import java.util.function.*;
024
025import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth.*;
026
027import com.nimbusds.oauth2.sdk.*;
028import com.nimbusds.oauth2.sdk.auth.*;
029import com.nimbusds.oauth2.sdk.http.*;
030import com.nimbusds.oauth2.sdk.id.*;
031import com.nimbusds.oauth2.sdk.pkce.*;
032import com.nimbusds.openid.connect.sdk.*;
033
034/**
035 * Authorization-code grant (RFC 6749 &sect;4.1) flow helper with mandatory PKCE per RFC 7636.
036 *
037 * <p>
038 * Wraps Nimbus's {@link AuthorizationRequest} (for URL construction) + {@link AuthorizationCodeGrant} +
039 * {@link TokenRequest} (for the exchange) + {@link CodeChallenge#compute(CodeChallengeMethod, CodeVerifier)
040 * PKCE S256 challenge generation}.
041 *
042 * <h5 class='topic'>Usage</h5>
043 *
044 * <p class='bjava'>
045 *    <jk>var</jk> flow = OAuthAuthorizationCodeFlow.<jsm>create</jsm>()
046 *       .authorizationEndpoint(URI.<jsm>create</jsm>(<js>"https://idp.example.com/oauth2/authorize"</js>))
047 *       .tokenEndpoint(URI.<jsm>create</jsm>(<js>"https://idp.example.com/oauth2/token"</js>))
048 *       .clientId(<js>"web-app"</js>)
049 *       .clientSecret(<js>"..."</js>)
050 *       .redirectUri(URI.<jsm>create</jsm>(<js>"https://app.example.com/callback"</js>))
051 *       .scope(<js>"openid"</js>, <js>"profile"</js>)
052 *       .build();
053 *
054 *    <jk>var</jk> verifier = <jk>new</jk> CodeVerifier();
055 *    <jk>var</jk> challenge = CodeChallenge.<jsm>compute</jsm>(CodeChallengeMethod.<jsf>S256</jsf>, verifier);
056 *    <jk>var</jk> authUrl = flow.buildAuthorizationUrl(<js>"some-state"</js>, challenge);
057 *
058 *    <jc>// After the IdP redirects back with ?code=...</jc>
059 *    <jk>var</jk> token = flow.exchange(<jv>code</jv>, verifier);
060 * </p>
061 *
062 * <p>
063 * The flow does NOT manage state / PKCE-verifier storage; that's the caller's responsibility per OIDC RP
064 * charter (see {@code OidcDiscoveryClient} javadoc).
065 *
066 * @since 10.0.0
067 */
068@SuppressWarnings({
069   "java:S1192" // Duplicate string literals are OAuth protocol parameter names (e.g. "code", "grant_type"); intentional
070})
071public class OAuthAuthorizationCodeFlow {
072
073   /**
074    * Static creator.
075    *
076    * @return A new builder.
077    */
078   public static Builder create() {
079      return new Builder();
080   }
081
082   /**
083    * Builder.
084    */
085   public static class Builder {
086      private URI authorizationEndpoint;
087      private URI tokenEndpoint;
088      private String clientId;
089      private Supplier<String> clientSecretSupplier;
090      private URI redirectUri;
091      private Set<String> scopes = new LinkedHashSet<>();
092      private Consumer<HTTPRequest> httpRequestConfigurator;
093
094      /** Constructor. */
095      protected Builder() {}
096
097      /**
098       * Sets the authorization endpoint URL.  Required.
099       *
100       * @param value The endpoint URL.
101       * @return This object.
102       */
103      public Builder authorizationEndpoint(URI value) {
104         authorizationEndpoint = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
105         return this;
106      }
107
108      /**
109       * Sets the token endpoint URL.  Required.
110       *
111       * @param value The endpoint URL.
112       * @return This object.
113       */
114      public Builder tokenEndpoint(URI value) {
115         tokenEndpoint = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
116         return this;
117      }
118
119      /**
120       * Sets the OAuth client ID.  Required.
121       *
122       * @param value The client ID.
123       * @return This object.
124       */
125      public Builder clientId(String value) {
126         clientId = assertArgNotNullOrBlank("value", value);
127         return this;
128      }
129
130      /**
131       * Sets the client secret.  May be omitted for public clients (PKCE-only).
132       *
133       * @param value The client secret.
134       * @return This object.
135       */
136      public Builder clientSecret(String value) {
137         assertArgNotNullOrBlank("value", value);
138         clientSecretSupplier = () -> value;
139         return this;
140      }
141
142      /**
143       * Sets the client secret via a supplier.
144       *
145       * @param value The supplier.
146       * @return This object.
147       */
148      public Builder clientSecretSupplier(Supplier<String> value) {
149         clientSecretSupplier = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
150         return this;
151      }
152
153      /**
154       * Sets the redirect URI.  Required.
155       *
156       * @param value The redirect URI.
157       * @return This object.
158       */
159      public Builder redirectUri(URI value) {
160         redirectUri = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
161         return this;
162      }
163
164      /**
165       * Adds requested scopes.
166       *
167       * @param values The scopes.
168       * @return This object.
169       */
170      public Builder scope(String... values) {
171         assertArgNotNull("values", values);
172         for (var v : values) {
173            assertArgNotNullOrBlank("scope", v);
174            scopes.add(v);
175         }
176         return this;
177      }
178
179      /**
180       * Sets the HTTP request configurator.
181       *
182       * @param value The callback.
183       * @return This object.
184       */
185      public Builder httpRequestConfigurator(Consumer<HTTPRequest> value) {
186         httpRequestConfigurator = assertArgNotNull("value", value);
187         return this;
188      }
189
190      /**
191       * Builds the flow.
192       *
193       * @return A new {@link OAuthAuthorizationCodeFlow}.
194       */
195      public OAuthAuthorizationCodeFlow build() {
196         if (authorizationEndpoint == null)
197            throw new IllegalStateException("OAuthAuthorizationCodeFlow requires authorizationEndpoint(...)");
198         if (tokenEndpoint == null)
199            throw new IllegalStateException("OAuthAuthorizationCodeFlow requires tokenEndpoint(...)");
200         if (clientId == null)
201            throw new IllegalStateException("OAuthAuthorizationCodeFlow requires clientId(...)");
202         if (redirectUri == null)
203            throw new IllegalStateException("OAuthAuthorizationCodeFlow requires redirectUri(...)");
204         return new OAuthAuthorizationCodeFlow(this);
205      }
206   }
207
208   private final URI authorizationEndpoint;
209   private final URI tokenEndpoint;
210   private final String clientId;
211   private final Supplier<String> clientSecretSupplier;
212   private final URI redirectUri;
213   private final Set<String> scopes;
214   private final Consumer<HTTPRequest> httpRequestConfigurator;
215
216   /**
217    * Constructor.
218    *
219    * @param b The builder.
220    */
221   protected OAuthAuthorizationCodeFlow(Builder b) {
222      this.authorizationEndpoint = b.authorizationEndpoint;
223      this.tokenEndpoint = b.tokenEndpoint;
224      this.clientId = b.clientId;
225      this.clientSecretSupplier = b.clientSecretSupplier;
226      this.redirectUri = b.redirectUri;
227      this.scopes = Collections.unmodifiableSet(new LinkedHashSet<>(b.scopes));
228      this.httpRequestConfigurator = b.httpRequestConfigurator;
229   }
230
231   /**
232    * Builds the {@code authorize?...} URL the user-agent should be redirected to.
233    *
234    * @param state The opaque {@code state} parameter (CSRF protection).  Must not be <jk>null</jk> or
235    *    blank.
236    * @param codeChallenge The PKCE code challenge.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.  Always uses S256.
237    * @return The authorization URL.
238    */
239   @SuppressWarnings({
240      "deprecation" // Nimbus CodeChallenge overload is deprecated; no simpler alternative yet.
241   })
242   public URI buildAuthorizationUrl(String state, CodeChallenge codeChallenge) {
243      assertArgNotNullOrBlank("state", state);
244      assertArgNotNull("codeChallenge", codeChallenge);
245      Scope nimbusScope = scopes.isEmpty() ? null : new Scope(scopes.toArray(new String[0]));
246      var request = new AuthorizationRequest.Builder(new ResponseType(ResponseType.Value.CODE), new ClientID(clientId))
247         .endpointURI(authorizationEndpoint)
248         .redirectionURI(redirectUri)
249         .scope(nimbusScope)
250         .state(new State(state))
251         .codeChallenge(codeChallenge, CodeChallengeMethod.S256)
252         .build();
253      return request.toURI();
254   }
255
256   /**
257    * Builds an OpenID Connect {@code authorize?...} URL carrying an OIDC {@code nonce} parameter.
258    *
259    * <p>
260    * Unlike {@link #buildAuthorizationUrl(String, CodeChallenge)} (which emits a plain OAuth 2.0
261    * {@link AuthorizationRequest} with no {@code nonce}), this method emits an OIDC
262    * {@link AuthenticationRequest} so the IdP echoes the supplied {@code nonce} back inside the issued
263    * ID token.  An OpenID Connect relying party stores the {@code nonce} before the redirect and
264    * verifies the {@code nonce} claim on the returned ID token to defeat token replay.
265    *
266    * <p>
267    * The configured {@code scope(...)} set is used as-is; OIDC requires it to contain {@code openid}.
268    * The optional {@code customizer} receives the underlying {@link com.nimbusds.openid.connect.sdk.AuthenticationRequest.Builder} so
269    * callers can set OIDC-specific parameters (e.g. {@code prompt}, {@code max_age}, {@code acr_values})
270    * without this module needing to surface each one.
271    *
272    * @param state The opaque {@code state} parameter (CSRF protection).  Must not be <jk>null</jk> or
273    *    blank.
274    * @param codeChallenge The PKCE code challenge.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.  Always uses S256.
275    * @param nonce The OIDC {@code nonce} value.  Must not be <jk>null</jk> or blank.
276    * @param customizer Optional hook on the {@link com.nimbusds.openid.connect.sdk.AuthenticationRequest.Builder} for OIDC-specific
277    *    parameters.  May be <jk>null</jk>.
278    * @return The authorization URL.
279    */
280   @SuppressWarnings({
281      "deprecation" // Nimbus CodeChallenge overload is deprecated; no simpler alternative yet.
282   })
283   public URI buildAuthenticationUrl(String state, CodeChallenge codeChallenge, String nonce, Consumer<AuthenticationRequest.Builder> customizer) {
284      assertArgNotNullOrBlank("state", state);
285      assertArgNotNull("codeChallenge", codeChallenge);
286      assertArgNotNullOrBlank("nonce", nonce);
287      Scope nimbusScope = scopes.isEmpty() ? new Scope("openid") : new Scope(scopes.toArray(new String[0]));
288      var builder = new AuthenticationRequest.Builder(new ResponseType(ResponseType.Value.CODE), nimbusScope, new ClientID(clientId), redirectUri)
289         .endpointURI(authorizationEndpoint)
290         .state(new State(state))
291         .nonce(new Nonce(nonce))
292         .codeChallenge(codeChallenge, CodeChallengeMethod.S256);
293      if (customizer != null)
294         customizer.accept(builder);
295      return builder.build().toURI();
296   }
297
298   /**
299    * Exchanges the authorization code returned by the IdP for an access token.
300    *
301    * @param code The {@code code} query parameter from the IdP redirect.  Must not be <jk>null</jk> or
302    *    blank.
303    * @param codeVerifier The PKCE verifier matching the challenge passed to
304    *    {@link #buildAuthorizationUrl(String, CodeChallenge)}.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
305    * @return The acquired token.
306    */
307   public OAuthToken exchange(String code, CodeVerifier codeVerifier) {
308      assertArgNotNullOrBlank("code", code);
309      assertArgNotNull("codeVerifier", codeVerifier);
310      var grant = new AuthorizationCodeGrant(new AuthorizationCode(code), redirectUri, codeVerifier);
311      TokenRequest req;
312      if (clientSecretSupplier != null) {
313         var clientAuth = new ClientSecretBasic(new ClientID(clientId), new Secret(clientSecretSupplier.get()));
314         req = new TokenRequest.Builder(tokenEndpoint, clientAuth, grant).build();
315      } else {
316         req = new TokenRequest.Builder(tokenEndpoint, new ClientID(clientId), grant).build();
317      }
318      return Flows.send(req, httpRequestConfigurator);
319   }
320
321   /**
322    * Returns the authorization endpoint URL.
323    *
324    * @return The endpoint.
325    */
326   public URI getAuthorizationEndpoint() {
327      return authorizationEndpoint;
328   }
329
330   /**
331    * Returns the token endpoint URL.
332    *
333    * @return The endpoint.
334    */
335   public URI getTokenEndpoint() {
336      return tokenEndpoint;
337   }
338
339   /**
340    * Returns the client ID.
341    *
342    * @return The client ID.
343    */
344   public String getClientId() {
345      return clientId;
346   }
347
348   /**
349    * Returns the redirect URI.
350    *
351    * @return The redirect URI.
352    */
353   public URI getRedirectUri() {
354      return redirectUri;
355   }
356
357   /**
358    * Returns the requested scopes.
359    *
360    * @return An unmodifiable view.
361    */
362   public Set<String> getScopes() {
363      return scopes;
364   }
365}
